name_cn:
665719 Side Stud Ultra Mini Pink
🏆 [MCM] Classic: Double Row Studs on the Side. Made from our iconic Visetos coated canvas. Features a luxurious sheepskin lining 🐑 with a tablet 💻 pocket inside. YKK zipper, copper plate with unique serial number 🔢. Not repeated.
